svg.text: Multilayer perceptron · 4096 → 1024 → 256 → 64 → 1 · ~4.5 M parameters · no framework, no autograd
BACKWARD · upstream gradient threaded layer-by-layer (chain rule, hand-derived)
— derived and coded by hand; every gradient verified numerically
max relative error < 1e-6 → backprop is correct
